name: analyze

input.text: Beautiful happily running development creates wonderful organization.

_note: LENS_ACTIONS handler. Dispatch key 'linguistics.analyze'. app/lenses/linguistics/page.tsx Quick-Analysis box sends lensRun('linguistics','analyze',{text,type:'morphosyntactic'}); renders data.result.content (string). Handler reads params.text||artifact.data.text||content, String-coerced (already hardened). Returns {content, wordCount, sentenceCount, lexicalDiversity, readabilityGrade, readingLevel, wordClasses}. Validation: empty/missing text → ok:false 'text required'. Pinned by server/tests/linguistics-lens-macros.test.js.
